power.method: 24V AC or High PoE, up to 50W

features: very low-light rated: 0.005 lux color / 0.0005 lux B&W (AGC on)
release_notes: LTS (LT Security Inc.) is a US-based distributor selling Hikvision OEM hardware under its own model numbering. Hikvision-derived firmware ships with ONVIF disabled by default since v5.5.0 — must be manually enabled in the camera's web UI before use with third-party NVRs/Frigate/Home Assistant.

frigate.notes: Standard Hikvision-OEM RTSP path convention likely applies but not independently confirmed for this exact model. PTZ control via ONVIF requires ONVIF to be manually enabled first (disabled by default on Hikvision-derived firmware v5.5.0+).

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF must be manually enabled first. Once enabled, PTZ control should work through the generic ONVIF integration given the Hikvision-derived platform.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model.
